condition: A production replay or failure-injection benchmark shows an RL-primary traffic-engineering policy preserves SLA behavior under failures, demand shifts, and update races.
threshold_or_event: A shadow-mode or replay study using production traffic and rollback criteria directly validates the behavior named in C-016.
action: Re-open C-016 and X-002; reassess whether Option B can move from bounded augmentation toward a stronger pilot.

condition: The Teal paper's DOI metadata shows a retraction, correction, or superseding publication that changes its status as the strongest learning-accelerated TE evidence.
threshold_or_event: S-001 DOI metadata reports retraction, correction, or supersession.
action: Pause reliance on Teal-backed augmentation claims until the source status is reviewed and replacement evidence is mapped.

condition: Local solver profiling shows deterministic LP/MIP/CP-SAT cannot meet the required control-loop deadline without unacceptable operator workload.
threshold_or_event: The operator's own latency and on-call review identifies the incumbent solver path as the bottleneck for the intended control loop.
monitoring_source: local solver profiling and on-call review
action: Reassess Option A against Option B and require an ablation plan before changing production authority.
